verdict_reasoning: SRC is a Src-family non-receptor tyrosine kinase canonically anchored to the cytoplasmic (inner) leaflet of the plasma membrane via N-terminal myristoylation and palmitoylation. Its kinase domain faces the cytoplasm, so it is not accessible from the extracellular face under baseline conditions. However, tumor cells display SRC on the outer leaflet as a cancer ecto-kinase (cell-state-induced surface presentation documented in multiple cancer cell lines), qualifying it as contextual/cell_state_induced. This ecto-pool represents a genuine extracellular-face surface story for therapeutic targeting.
